verses.quran_arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ وَٱلطُّورِ
verses.text: By the mountain

verses.quran_arabic: وَكِتَٰبٍۢ مَّسْطُورٍۢ
verses.text: and a Book written

verses.quran_arabic: فِى رَقٍّۢ مَّنشُورٍۢ
verses.text: on parchment unrolled!

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْبَيْتِ ٱلْمَعْمُورِ
verses.text: By the inhabited House!

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلسَّقْفِ ٱلْمَرْفُوعِ
verses.text: By the roof raised up

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلْبَحْرِ ٱلْمَسْجُورِ
verses.text: and the sea surging!

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ عَذَابَ رَبِّكَ لَوَٰقِعٌۭ
verses.text: Surely the punishment of your Lord is indeed going to fall!

verses.quran_arabic: مَّا لَهُۥ مِن دَافِعٍۢ
verses.text: (There is) no one to repel it.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ تَمُورُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ مَوْرًۭا
verses.text: On the Day when the sky will shake,

verses.quran_arabic: وَتَسِيرُ ٱلْجِبَالُ سَيْرًۭا
verses.text: and the mountains fly away,

verses.quran_arabic: فَوَيْلٌۭ يَوْمَئِذٍۢ لِّلْمُكَذِّبِينَ
verses.text: woe that Day to the ones who called (it) a lie,

verses.quran_arabic: ٱلَّذِينَ هُمْ فِى خَوْضٍۢ يَلْعَبُونَ
verses.text: who – they were playing around in (their) banter.

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ يُدَعُّونَ إِلَىٰ نَارِ جَهَنَّمَ دَعًّا
verses.text: On the Day when they will be shoved forcefully into the fire of Gehenna:

verses.quran_arabic: هَٰذِهِ ٱلنَّارُ ٱلَّتِى كُنتُم بِهَا تُكَذِّبُونَ
verses.text: ‘This is the Fire which you called a lie!

verses.quran_arabic: أَفَسِحْرٌ هَٰذَآ أَمْ أَنتُمْ لَا تُبْصِرُونَ
verses.text: Is this magic or do you not see?

verses.quran_arabic: ٱصْلَوْهَا فَٱصْبِرُوٓا۟ أَوْ لَا تَصْبِرُوا۟ سَوَآءٌ عَلَيْكُمْ ۖ إِنَّمَا تُجْزَوْنَ مَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: Burn in it! Bear it patiently or do not bear it patiently – (it is) the same for you. You are only being repaid for what you have done.’

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى جَنَّٰتٍۢ وَنَعِيمٍۢ
verses.text: Surely the ones who guard (themselves) will be in Gardens and bliss,

verses.quran_arabic: فَٰكِهِينَ بِمَآ ءَاتَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ رَبُّهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
verses.text: rejoicing in what their Lord has given them, and (because) their Lord has guarded them against the punishment of the Furnace.

verses.quran_arabic: كُلُوا۟ وَٱشْرَبُوا۟ هَنِيٓـًٔۢا بِمَا كُنتُمْ تَعْمَلُونَ
verses.text: ‘Eat and drink with satisfaction, (in return) for what you have done.’

verses.quran_arabic: مُتَّكِـِٔينَ عَلَىٰ سُرُرٍۢ مَّصْفُوفَةٍۢ ۖ وَزَوَّجْنَٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍۢ
verses.text: (There they will be) reclining on couches lined up, and We shall marry them to (maidens) with dark, wide eyes.

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُوا۟ وَٱتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّتَهُمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَىْءٍۢ ۚ كُلُّ ٱمْرِئٍۭ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٌۭ
verses.text: (For) those who believe, and whose descendants followed them in belief, We shall join their descendants with them, and We shall not deprive them of any of their deeds. Each person (is held) in pledge for what he has earned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَأَتۡبَعۡنَٰهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَمَآ أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٖۚ كُلُّ اُ۪مۡرِيِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: And those who attained faith and whom We followed (with) their offspring(s) in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَاَلَّذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَأَتۡبَعۡنَٰهُمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلۡحَقۡنَا  بِهِمۡ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمۡ وَمَا أَلَتۡنَٰهُم مِّنۡ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَيۡءٖۚ كُلُّ اُ۪مۡرِيِٕۢ بِمَا  كَسَبَ رَهِينٞ
canonical_variants.english: And those who attained faith and whom We followed (with) their offspring(s) in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ أَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَمَا أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَےْءٖۖ كُلُّ اُ۪مْرِےِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.

canonical_variants.arabic: وَالذِينَ ءَامَنُواْ وَاتَّبَعَتْهُمْ ذُرِّيَّتُهُم بِإِيمَٰنٍ اَلْحَقْنَا بِهِمْ ذُرِّيَّٰتِهِمْ وَمَآ أَلَتْنَٰهُم مِّنْ عَمَلِهِم مِّن شَےْءٖۖ كُلُّ اُ۪مْرِےِٕۢ بِمَا كَسَبَ رَهِينٞۖ
canonical_variants.english: And those who attained faith and whose offspring followed them in faith—We have united them with their offspring(s), and We have not deprived them of anything of their work; every person is in pledge for what (deeds) he has earned.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَمْدَدْنَٰهُم بِفَٰكِهَةٍۢ وَلَحْمٍۢ مِّمَّا يَشْتَهُونَ
verses.text: We shall increase them with fruits and meat of whatever (kind) they desire.

verses.quran_arabic: يَتَنَٰزَعُونَ فِيهَا كَأْسًۭا لَّا لَغْوٌۭ فِيهَا وَلَا تَأْثِيمٌۭ
verses.text: There they will pass (around) a cup to each other in which there is no frivolous or sinful talk,

verses.quran_arabic: ۞ وَيَطُوفُ عَلَيْهِمْ غِلْمَانٌۭ لَّهُمْ كَأَنَّهُمْ لُؤْلُؤٌۭ مَّكْنُونٌۭ
verses.text: and among them will circulate boys of their own, as if they were hidden pearls.

verses.quran_arabic: وَأَقْبَلَ بَعْضُهُمْ عَلَىٰ بَعْضٍۢ يَتَسَآءَلُونَ
verses.text: Some of them will approach others asking each other questions.

verses.quran_arabic: قَالُوٓا۟ إِنَّا كُنَّا قَبْلُ فِىٓ أَهْلِنَا مُشْفِقِينَ
verses.text: They will say, ‘Surely we were fearful among our family before,

verses.quran_arabic: فَمَنَّ ٱللَّهُ عَلَيْنَا وَوَقَىٰنَا عَذَابَ ٱلسَّمُومِ
verses.text: but God has bestowed favor on us, and guarded us against the punishment of the scorching (Fire).

verses.quran_arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ ۖ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْبَرُّ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
verses.text: Surely we used to call on Him before. Surely He – He is the Beneficent, the Compassionate.’

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ أَنَّهُۥ هُوَ اَ۬لْبَرُّ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُۖ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him, for He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.

canonical_variants.arabic: إِنَّا كُنَّا مِن قَبْلُ نَدْعُوهُ أَنَّهُۥ هُوَ اَ۬لْبَرُّ اُ۬لرَّحِيمُۖ
canonical_variants.english: Indeed, before this we used to pray to Him, for He is the Fulfiller of promises, the Bestower of mercy.

verses.quran_arabic: فَذَكِّرْ فَمَآ أَنتَ بِنِعْمَتِ رَبِّكَ بِكَاهِنٍۢ وَلَا مَجْنُونٍ
verses.text: So remind (them)! By the blessing of your Lord, you are neither an oracle-giver nor possessed.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ شَاعِرٌۭ نَّتَرَبَّصُ بِهِۦ رَيْبَ ٱلْمَنُونِ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘A poet, for whom we await the uncertainty of Fate’?

verses.quran_arabic: قُلْ تَرَبَّصُوا۟ فَإِنِّى مَعَكُم مِّنَ ٱلْمُتَرَبِّصِينَ
verses.text: Say: ‘(Just) wait! Surely I shall be one of those waiting with you.’

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ تَأْمُرُهُمْ أَحْلَٰمُهُم بِهَٰذَآ ۚ أَمْ هُمْ قَوْمٌۭ طَاغُونَ
verses.text: Or do their minds command them (to do) this, or are they a people who transgress insolently?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ تَقَوَّلَهُۥ ۚ بَل لَّا يُؤْمِنُونَ
verses.text: Or do they say, ‘He has invented it?’ No! They do not believe.

verses.quran_arabic: فَلْيَأْتُوا۟ بِحَدِيثٍۢ مِّثْلِهِۦٓ إِن كَانُوا۟ صَٰدِقِينَ
verses.text: Let them bring a proclamation like it, if they are truthful.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ خُلِقُوا۟ مِنْ غَيْرِ شَىْءٍ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْخَٰلِقُونَ
verses.text: Or were they created out of nothing? Or were they the creators?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ خَلَقُوا۟ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ ۚ بَل لَّا يُوقِنُونَ
verses.text: Or did they create the heavens and the earth? No! They are not certain.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمْ خَزَآئِنُ رَبِّكَ أَمْ هُمُ ٱلْمُصَۣيْطِرُونَ
verses.text: Or are the storehouses of your Lord with them, or are they the record-keepers?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ سُلَّمٌۭ يَسْتَمِعُونَ فِيهِ ۖ فَلْيَأْتِ مُسْتَمِعُهُم بِسُلْطَٰنٍۢ مُّبِينٍ
verses.text: Or do they have a ladder on which they (can) listen? Then let their listener bring clear authority.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُ ٱلْبَنَٰتُ وَلَكُمُ ٱلْبَنُونَ
verses.text: Or does He have daughters while you have sons?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ تَسْـَٔلُهُمْ أَجْرًۭا فَهُم مِّن مَّغْرَمٍۢ مُّثْقَلُونَ
verses.text: Or do you ask them for a reward, so that they are burdened with debt?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ عِندَهُمُ ٱلْغَيْبُ فَهُمْ يَكْتُبُونَ
verses.text: Or is the unseen in their keeping, so that they are writing it down?

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ يُرِيدُونَ كَيْدًۭا ۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلْمَكِيدُونَ
verses.text: Or do they intend a plot? Then those who disbelieve will be the ones plotted against.

verses.quran_arabic: أَمْ لَهُمْ إِلَٰهٌ غَيْرُ ٱللَّهِ ۚ سُبْحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشْرِكُونَ
verses.text: Or do they have a god other than God? Glory to God above what they associate!

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِن يَرَوْا۟ كِسْفًۭا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطًۭا يَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابٌۭ مَّرْكُومٌۭ
verses.text: Even if they see fragments of the sky falling, they will say, ‘A heap of clouds!’

verses.quran_arabic: فَذَرْهُمْ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُوا۟ يَوْمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِى فِيهِ يُصْعَقُونَ
verses.text: So leave them, until they meet their Day on which they will be thunderstruck

verses.quran_arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى عَنْهُمْ كَيْدُهُمْ شَيْـًۭٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
verses.text: – the Day when their plot will be of no use to them at all, and they will not be helped.

verses.quran_arabic: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابًۭا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
verses.text: Surely for those who do evil (there is) a punishment before that, but most of them do not know (it).

verses.quran_arabic: وَٱصْبِرْ لِحُكْمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعْيُنِنَا ۖ وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ
verses.text: Be patient for the judgment of your Lord. Surely you are in Our sight. Glorify your Lord with praise when you arise,

verses.quran_arabic: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيْلِ فَسَبِّحْهُ وَإِدْبَٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
verses.text: and glorify Him during part of the night, and (at) the setting of the stars.
